title: Airline Customer Satisfaction Drop
background: An airline has seen customer satisfaction scores decline despite on-time performance improving.
candidate_prompt: How would you evaluate the situation and recommend what the organization should do next?
good_answer_includes: Maps the customer journey and pain points
Identifies moments causing dissatisfaction or churn
Uses metrics such as NPS, wait time, and complaint rate
great_answer_includes: Segments experience issues by customer type or channel
Links experience improvements to revenue or retention
Considers employee incentives and operational constraints
Prioritizes fixes by impact and effort
interviewer_notes: A strong candidate should use a clear customer experience structure, isolate the most important drivers, and connect the recommendation to business impact.
